blank_affidavit.name: Blank Affidavit
blank_affidavit.desc: A sworn page waiting for a fact. Used to file a wild Manifestation into the dossier.

notarized_affidavit.name: Notarized Affidavit
notarized_affidavit.desc: The stamp makes it harder to dismiss. Improved filing rate.

subpoena_form.name: Subpoena Form
subpoena_form.desc: Compels the appearance. The machine respects its own paperwork most of all.

hot_meal_item.name: Hot Meal
hot_meal_item.desc: Restores half of one Manifestation's Resolve. Sometimes safety is a front desk and a hot meal.
